chief_complaint: A 10-year-old Indian male presented with a history of recurrent infections, nephrotic syndrome, and skeletal abnormalities.
history: Schimke immunoosseous dysplasia (SIOD) is an uncommon inherited genetic disorder. The patient was diagnosed with SIOD after harbouring copy number variants in the SMARCAL1 gene.
exam: Vital signs: normal. Physical examination revealed skeletal abnormalities and immune system deficiencies.
labs: Genetic analysis revealed copy number variants in the SMARCAL1 gene.
